# Unbound Classes and Types Registry

This document registers all C++ SDK classes and complex types that are currently unsupported, skipped, or fallback-mapped to `lightuserdata` or placeholders within the Lua bindings.

*(Automatically generated by `tools/generate_list_of_unbound.py`)*
